title: 6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
summary: Video tutorial demonstrating six workflow automation use cases for Claude Cowork, including automated morning briefs, content generation, inbox triage, report generation, live dashboards, and mobile agent control. Designed to help users move beyond basic chatbot usage toward AI-driven process automation.
writeup: This tutorial walks through six workflow automation use cases for Claude Cowork: automated morning briefs, content generation, inbox triage, report generation, live dashboards, and mobile agent control. The framing pushes past basic chatbot prompting toward agentic, process-level automation. The takeaway is a concrete set of patterns for delegating recurring tasks to an AI agent rather than running each interaction by hand.
